description: Speaker proposes 2 PM, corrects to 3 PM, then corrects back to 2 PM. Final confirmed time is 2 PM Thursday. Tests tracking the last confirmed value through corrections.

events.title: Design Review
events.reasoning: Alice initially proposes 2 PM, corrects to 3 PM, then corrects back to 2 PM after her conflict was resolved. The final confirmed time is 2 PM Thursday in the design lab.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour per Alice's 'probably just an hour'. Final time is 2 PM, not 3 PM, as Alice explicitly reverted.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: design review on Thursday at 2 PM in the design lab, after two time corrections.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Thursday = 2026-02-26. Key challenge: tracking the FINAL confirmed time through corrections (2pm -> 3pm -> back to 2pm). Expected event uses the final value.
